result.stdout:
Description:
  A CLI (command line interface) tool which sanitizes/removes Intent code management attributes and NuGet package references from a Visual Studio solution.

Usage:
  Intent.RoslynWeaverSanitizer.CLI <sln-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <sln-path>  The path of the .sln file of the solution to sanitize.

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
